idea-plugin.name: Rails Sidenotes
idea-plugin.description:
Rails Sidenotes

Displays ActiveRecord schema annotations from sidecar YAML files generated by the sidenotes Ruby gem.

Features

  • Gutter Icons — Database icon next to model class declarations with schema summary popup
  • Quick Documentation — Full schema as formatted HTML via Ctrl+Q on class names
  • Inlay Hints — Column types shown inline next to validates, attribute, scope, and self.attr references
  • Tool Window — "Sidenotes" panel showing full schema for the current model file
  • Regenerate — Run bundle exec rake sidenotes:generate from the Tools menu
  • Auto-refresh — File watcher detects changes to annotation files automatically
  • Rails Root Detection — Automatically finds your Rails app root, even in monorepo setups

How It Works

The plugin reads YAML annotation files from .annotations/ relative to your Rails root. These files are generated by the sidenotes gem and contain structured schema data (columns, types, indexes, associations) for each ActiveRecord model.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0

  • Initial release
  • Gutter icons for ActiveRecord model classes
  • Quick Documentation (Ctrl+Q) with full schema HTML
  • Inlay hints for validates, attribute, scope, and self.attr patterns
  • Sidenotes tool window panel
  • Regenerate annotations action in Tools menu
  • VFS file watcher for annotation directory
  • Rails root auto-detection with monorepo support
  • Configurable annotations directory and Rails root

action.description: Run bundle exec rake sidenotes:generate to regenerate annotation files
